title: WordPress Schema Plugin - Adding Schema Markup made easy
desc: Boost your website SEO with the best schema plugin around. Get started with Schema Pro and see the results yourself.
text:

Implement Schema Markup
Boost your website SEO in a few clicks. No coding skills needed.
Get Schema Pro

Outperform Your Competitors in Search Engines and Bring More Traffic to Your Website

Quick & Easy Setup
Implement accurate schema markup without touching a line of code fast and easy.
All Schema Types
Use the right schema in the right situation from 20+ options within Schema Pro.
Automation For Multiple Pages
Configure schema markup once and implement it anywhere on your website in no time.
How Does Schema Pro Work?
Schema markup can get complicated but Schema Pro makes it easy with a user-friendly interface, no coding requirement and simple 3 step process.
Step 1: Select a Schema Type
Schema Pro offers all major types of schema, including recipe, book, article, job posting, and a lot more. Simply select the one you wish to implement from the dropdown menu.
Step 2: Choose the Page/Post to Implement the Schema
Schema Pro enables you to control schema across your entire website. Use the same schema everywhere or control where and when it appears.
Step 3: Map the Content
Schema Pro allows you to map default data such as page title, featured image, author, date and more. Configure your schema however you like with just a few clicks.
Easy Setup, Stunning Results!
Schema Pro + Yoast Working Hand in Hand
Wondering whether Schema Pro and Yoast will work together? Yes they will. Use the two plugins together and utilize their combined power to boost your on-page SEO. You decide what plugin controls what feature using simple settings.
Automated Schema Markup to Save Time
Adding schema markup takes time, but Schema Pro can automatically map fields and add schema markup throughout your entire website within just a few minutes.
Custom Field Mapping for
In-depth Implementation
Some fields like the title, author name, etc. get their values by default. Overwrite default data fields and other entries quickly and easily with Schema Pro.
Real-time Testing with Immediate Feedback and Suggestions
You can’t go wrong with Schema Pro! With built-in field validation and links to the Google Structured Data Testing Tool, you can validate your schema in seconds.
